svg.title: Build rhythm: GitHub weekly commits and code changes
svg.desc: Build rhythm: weekly GitHub activity across the default branches of owned repositories, 2021-07-11 through 2026-07-05. The upper panel shows commits; the lower shows additions and deletions. Both scales compress large spikes so quieter weeks remain visible. Totals: 2,938 commits, 29,104,554 additions, 28,513,917 deletions, and 159 active weeks. Highest commit week Jun 28, 2026: 795 commits. Largest line-change week Jul 5, 2026: 24,222,547 additions and 21,992,716 deletions.
svg.text: Typical active week · 2k lines changed · Updated Jul 12, 2026
Big weeks stay big. Small weeks still show.
